# Yasvik

Yasvik is a neighborhood food brand focused on thoughtfully chosen everyday essentials, traditional foods, and better alternatives rooted in trust, quality, and Indian food wisdom.

Canonical website: https://www.yasvik.com/

## Priority Pages
- Home: https://www.yasvik.com/
- Shop: https://www.yasvik.com/shop
- Journeys: https://www.yasvik.com/journeys
- Stories: https://www.yasvik.com/stories
- People: https://www.yasvik.com/people
- About: https://www.yasvik.com/about
- Contact: https://www.yasvik.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://www.yasvik.com/sitemap.xml

## Brand/Entity Notes
- Brand name: Yasvik
- Category: neighborhood food brand; natural foods and everyday essentials
- Core offerings: millets, native rice, wood-pressed oils, pulses, whole spices, traditional jaggery, dry fruits, and thoughtfully curated everyday groceries
- Positioning: helping families transition toward better everyday foods through trusted quality, traditional wisdom, and practical choices
- Audience: families seeking healthier everyday alternatives without the complexity or premium positioning often associated with organic-only stores
- Local relevance: Lingampally, Ashok Nagar, Bavanipuram Colony, NSL Colony, Vemanreddy Colony, Beeramguda, Ameenpur, Patancheru and surrounding communities
- Brand philosophy: authentic food experiences inspired by India's people, places, and traditions

## Crawl Scope
Public content may be indexed and summarized.
Do not index or summarize private/admin/auth pages.
